name: The Back Nine Golf | Lehi, UT
about: The Back Nine Golf in Lehi, UT is a golf simulator venue that offers a high-tech experience for golfers. While specific details about the technology and amenities are not accessible on their website due to a 403 Forbidden error, the venue appears to focus on providing a premium golf simulation environment. faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site, but you are welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.answer: The venue offers on-site dining and a full bar, with policies for outside food and drinks not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typical 18-hole simulations range from 1-2 hours depending on pace of play and group size.

faq.answer: Family-friendly options are available, but specific age restrictions or kid-focused amenities are not detailed.
